action: Create a 100-word story with multiple characters in the following format: (character1 name) dialogue of character1... (character2 name) dialogue of character2, (narrator) like an audiobook, and save it.
fallback_action: If creating and saving a 100-word story fails, create a 50-word story with only one character instead.

recipe.steps: Create a 100-word story with multiple characters in the specified format. This includes the dialogues of the different characters and a brief narration.
Save the created story in memory using the 'save_data_in_memory' tool.
Ask the StatusVerifier agent to confirm the completion of the action.
